_templatesRef: Prompt/template paths: planner and PRD use assets/prompts/ (override with PLAN_AN_GO_PROMPTS_DIR). Step 3 uses assets/prompts/prd-revision.md (override with PLAN_AN_GO_PRD_REVISION_PROMPT_FILE). See scripts/cli/wizard/README.md and docs/ENV-README.md.

questions.prompt: PRD file path or name (default: PRD.md)
Product or feature description (prompt for PRD)
Plan file path for runner (default: PLAN.md)
